top_signals.title: World’s largest olive oil producer gives upbeat outlook after historic industry crisis
top_signals.summary: Spain's Deoleo, the world's largest olive oil producer, says the industry is gradually recovering from one of the most challenging moments in its history.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: NSE Stock Draws Rare ‘Sell’ Call Ahead of Long-Awaited IPO Debut
top_signals.summary: National Stock Exchange of India Ltd., the operator of the world’s largest derivatives exchange by trading volume, has received a ‘sell’ recommendation just as it gears up to launch the country’s biggest initial public offering.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
